body:
Opus fresh-eyes review of FEAT-021 rewrite (commit 0660c47, reachable from merge cfe1eaf).

HARD CHECK: grep -iE "react|tanstack|react-router" returns 0 against HEAD blob.
SOFT CHECK: URL scheme /nodes/:nodeId/projects/:projectId/* preserved verbatim. Houdini patterns shown (.gql files, +page.ts load fns, subscription example). TC-NNN mapping table covers TC-001..008, TC-009, TC-010, TC-012, TC-022, TC-023/9. TC-011 absent but not orphaned.
QUALITY: Cleanly models the multi-node reality with per-page File: annotations.
VERDICT: APPROVE. Leave closed.
source: opus batch review of 3 Stage 1 closes
summary: APPROVE: 437-line rewrite, zero React/TanStack refs, URL scheme preserved, Houdini patterns + TC-NNN mapping table present
